questions.question: Explain three major benefits of Cloud Computing that make it attractive for business organizations.
keyPoints: Cost efficiency through pay-as-you-go pricing and elimination of capital expenditure
Scalability and elasticity to handle varying workloads dynamically
Accessibility and mobility enabling access to resources from anywhere

questions.question: Discuss three significant limitations or challenges associated with adopting Cloud Computing in an organization.
keyPoints: Data security and privacy concerns in multi-tenant cloud environments
Dependency on internet connectivity for cloud service access
Limited control over infrastructure and configuration settings

questions.question: Analyze the economic, operational, and strategic benefits of Cloud Computing for modern enterprises. How does cloud computing transform IT infrastructure management?
keyPoints: Economic benefits: reduced capital expenditure, operational expense model, pay-per-use pricing
Operational benefits: automatic software updates, disaster recovery, 24/7 availability
Strategic benefits: faster deployment, focus on core business, global reach
Technical benefits: automatic scaling, load balancing, high performance computing

questions.question: Evaluate the major limitations and challenges of Cloud Computing implementation. Discuss technical, security, and compliance issues that organizations must address, and propose strategies to mitigate these concerns.
keyPoints: Technical limitations: latency issues, dependency on network, potential downtime
Security challenges: data breaches, insider threats, authentication vulnerabilities
Compliance and regulatory issues: data residency, industry-specific regulations
Vendor lock-in risks, migration difficulties, and service level agreement limitations
